name: UK CPI Annual Rate (All Items)
notes: ONS CDID D7G7 (dataset MM23) — CPI 12-month rate. Verified live 2026-05-28 (2.8% @ 2026-04). Keyless Zebedee /data API.

name: UK CPIH Annual Rate (All Items)
notes: ONS CDID L55O (dataset MM23) — CPIH 12-month rate (includes owner-occupier housing). Verified live 2026-05-28 (3.0% @ 2026-04).

name: UK GDP Chained Volume Measure (Real GDP)
notes: ONS CDID ABMI (dataset PN2) — real GDP seasonally adjusted. Verified live 2026-05-28 (710896 @ 2026-Q1).

name: UK Unemployment Rate (16+)
notes: ONS CDID MGSX (dataset LMS) — unemployment rate aged 16+ seasonally adjusted. Verified live 2026-05-28 (5.0%).

name: UK Employment Rate (16-64)
notes: ONS CDID LF24 (dataset LMS) — employment rate aged 16-64 seasonally adjusted. Verified live 2026-05-28 (75.0%).

name: UK Average Weekly Earnings Regular Pay Growth (YoY 3M avg)
notes: ONS CDID KAI9 (dataset LMS) — AWE whole-economy regular pay (ex-arrears) YoY 3-month average growth SA. Verified live 2026-05-28 (3.4%).

name: UK Core CPI Annual Rate (ex Energy/Food/Alcohol/Tobacco)
notes: ONS CDID DKO8 (dataset MM23) — CPI 12-month rate excluding energy/food/alcoholic beverages/tobacco (the BoE-watched core measure). Back to Jan 1989. Verified live 2026-06-10 (2.5% @ 2026-04). Wired §3.1.3 follow-up: blended into UK_INFL1 alongside GBR_CPI headline.

name: UK Index of Production (B-E Production CVM SA)
notes: ONS CDID K222 (dataset DIOP) — Index of Production sections B–E (mining/manufacturing/utilities) chained volume measure SA. Verified live 2026-06-10 (939 monthly obs back to 1948-01; last 2026-03). Closes the UK industrial production leg of §3.1 Stage C.

name: UK Index of Services (Total SA)
notes: ONS CDID S2KU (dataset IOS1) — Index of Services total SA. Verified live 2026-06-10 (351 monthly obs back to 1997-01; last 2026-03). Closes the UK services-output leg of §3.1 Stage C (~80% of UK GDP).

name: UK Retail Sales Index (Volume SA all retailers inc fuel)
notes: ONS CDID J5EK (dataset DRSI) — RSI volume SA all retailers including auto fuel. Verified live 2026-06-10 (364 monthly obs back to 1996-01; last 2026-04). Closes the UK retail-sales leg of §3.1 Stage C.
